subject: Swift Trigger 600914 is noise
body:
S. D. Barthelmy (GSFC) & H. A. Krimm (GSFC/USRA),
(i.e. the Swift-BAT team):
 
Using the data set from T-239 to T+963 sec from recent telemetry downlinks,
we confirm that trigger #600914 (Barthelmy, et al., GCN Circ. 16352)
is due to noise and is not astrophysical.
